_README: Copy this file to assets/sources.local.json (gitignored) and fill it with sources you are AUTHORISED to use. Keys are paths INSIDE the pack (assets/worms-<pack>/...). Values are http(s) URLs or local file paths - e.g. files you extracted from your own legally-owned copy of Worms Armageddon. See ASSETS.md for the legal context and where assets can be obtained. Nothing here is downloaded for you and nothing is committed.

_reference_sources.extract_from_owned_copy: DATA/Gfx/*.dir via SpriteEddy (worms2d.info/SpriteEddy) - see ASSETS.md Path B
